{"society_power": 2.0, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": -2.0, "state_change": 2.5, "key_event": "1953 coup crushes Mosaddegh, restores despotic Pahlavi state", "reasoning": "The vibrant early-1950s mobilization (National Front, nationalization) was crushed by the 1953 coup, after which SAVAK, oil rents, and personalist royal centralization built a strong despotic Leviathan while parties, press, and unions were suppressed into a hollowed-out civil society."}
